case_title: UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION vs. NELSON, CRAIG THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, CRAIG THOMAS $8,746.81 PRINCIPAL, $992.10 INTEREST, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,856.41
